name: @radzor/zip-archive
description: Create, read, and extract ZIP archives. Supports streaming creation for large archives, per-file compression levels, and in-memory operations. No native dependencies — pure JavaScript implementation.

inputs.name: compression
inputs.description: Default compression method. store=no compression (fast), deflate=compressed.

inputs.name: level
inputs.description: Deflate compression level 1-9. Higher = smaller file, slower.

outputs.name: fileList
outputs.type: Array<{ name: string; size: number; compressedSize: number; isDirectory: boolean }>
outputs.description: List of entries in an archive.

events.name: onFileAdded
events.description: Fired when a file is added to the archive.

events.name: onExtracted
events.description: Fired when an archive is extracted.

events.name: onError
events.description: Fired on archive or extraction error.

actions.name: create

params.name: files
params.type: Array<{ name: string; content: Buffer | string }>
params.description: Files to include in the archive.

actions.description: Create a ZIP archive from an array of file entries.

actions.name: extract

params.name: archive
params.description: ZIP archive as Buffer or file path.

actions.description: Extract all files from an archive. Returns a map of filename → content.

actions.name: list
actions.returns: Promise<Array<{ name: string; size: number; compressedSize: number; isDirectory: boolean }>>
actions.description: List all entries in an archive without extracting.

actions.name: addFile
actions.description: Append a single file to an existing archive.

llm.constraints: In-memory operations — large archives require sufficient heap memory. For archives over 500MB, use streaming mode. Directory entries must end with /.
